stepsContent.title: How does it work?
stepsContent.intro: Upload your image and let the AI do the work for you.

step_1.title: Choose a plan
step_1.description: The plan you select determines the number of credits available every 24 hours.

step_2.title: Create an account
step_2.description: A valid email address and a secure password are all you need. No credit card is required for the free plan.

step_3.title: Use our service
step_3.description: Upload your images, wait a few seconds, and your background is removed. Depending on your subscription, additional editing tools are available.

card_1.title: Background removal
card_1.description: Automatically removes the background from your images to create clean, ready-to-use visuals.

card_2.title: Social media images
card_2.description: Formats and optimizes your images for major social networks to ensure a professional look.

card_3.title: Image conversion
card_3.description: Converts and resizes your images to the desired format and dimensions, with no noticeable quality loss.

card_4.title: Product showcasing
card_4.description: Showcases your products in tailored scenes for selling or presenting them effectively.

card_1.title: Web developers
card_1.description: Automate background removal and image editing directly inside your applications with a fast and simple API.

card_2.title: Photographers
card_2.description: Save valuable time by automatically removing backgrounds and enhancing your shots in just a few seconds.

card_3.title: E-commerce stores
card_3.description: Create clean, consistent product visuals ready to be published on your website or marketplace.

card_4.title: Designers & graphic artists
card_4.description: Speed up your workflow with clean cutouts and realistic mockups, without time-consuming manual work.

card_5.title: Content creators
card_5.description: Design thumbnails and eye-catching visuals without needing advanced image editing skills.

card_6.title: Marketing agencies
card_6.description: Produce campaign-ready visuals optimized for ads and social media in just a few clicks.

card_7.title: Marketplace managers
card_7.description: Standardize seller images by automatically removing backgrounds to match your visual guidelines.

card_8.title: Real estate
card_8.description: Showcase your properties with clean visuals, free of distracting backgrounds, for listings and marketing materials.

card_9.title: Artisans & makers
card_9.description: Highlight your creations with sharp, professional visuals without investing in expensive equipment.

faqHome.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqHome.reponse_1: Yes. Our platform is fully GDPR compliant. Personal data is only collected when strictly necessary (account registration or contact forms). You have the right to access, modify, and delete your data at any time. Read our privacy policy to learn more about how images are handled.
faqHome.question_2: Who is this background removal service for?
faqHome.reponse_2: Our tool is designed for content creators, e-commerce sellers, photographers, designers, students, and anyone who needs fast, high-quality background removal for professional or personal use.
faqHome.reponse_3: Yes. No data is shared with third parties, no tracking cookies are used, and all payments are securely processed by Stripe, a PCI-DSS certified provider.
faqHome.question_4: How do I use the service?
faqHome.reponse_4: Simply choose a plan (free or paid), create an account, and upload your images. Processing starts automatically and results are available for download within seconds. Read our privacy policy for more details.
faqHome.question_5: Is the free plan really free?
faqHome.reponse_5: Yes, completely. Some advanced features are limited, but no credit card is required and you receive monthly credits to use the service at no cost.
faqHome.question_6: Are my images used to train AI models?
faqHome.reponse_6: No. Our partner Replicate, which provides and hosts the AI models, states that images are not used for training purposes. Read our privacy policy for more details.
faqHome.question_7: What are the risks for my personal data?
faqHome.reponse_7: There are no significant risks. We only collect your IP address (for API security) and the information you voluntarily provide (registration or contact form). No sensitive data is requested or stored.
faqHome.question_8: How long are my images stored?
faqHome.reponse_8: We do not store your images. We only act as an intermediary between you and the AI processing models.
faqHome.question_9: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqHome.reponse_9: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account. Cancellation stops automatic renewal without affecting your current access period.
faqHome.reponse_10: No. According to our subscription terms, already paid periods remain due until their end date, even if canceled early.
faqHome.question_11: What is the quality of the results?
faqHome.reponse_11: Our AI models are trained to deliver clean, precise, and professional background removal, even for complex images. Paid plans benefit from enhanced quality and advanced features.
faqHome.question_12: Is there a limit to how many images I can process?
faqHome.reponse_12: Yes. Each plan includes a monthly credit quota corresponding to the number of AI processing operations. You can check your balance anytime in your dashboard.
faqHome.question_13: Does the service work on mobile?
faqHome.reponse_13: Yes. The service works on smartphones, tablets, and desktops. However, for the best experience, we recommend using a larger screen for editing tools.
faqHome.question_14: What if the result is not accurate?
faqHome.reponse_14: You can try again with a higher-quality image or use our editing tools (depending on your plan). If the issue persists, our support team can assist you.
faqHome.reponse_15: An API will be available soon for professional plans, allowing integration into your apps, workflows, or e-commerce platforms.
faqHome.reponse_16: No. All payment data is handled exclusively by Stripe. We never have access to it and do not store it.

faqPricing.question_1: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqPricing.reponse_1: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account. Cancellation simply disables automatic renewal. Your access remains active until the end of the already paid period.
faqPricing.reponse_2: No. In accordance with our policy and applicable laws, subscriptions already started are non-refundable. However, you retain access to the service until the end of your current billing period.
faqPricing.question_3: Can I change my plan (upgrade or downgrade)?
faqPricing.reponse_3: Yes. You can change your subscription at any time by upgrading or downgrading according to your needs.
faqPricing.question_4: What happens if I upgrade my plan?
faqPricing.reponse_4: If you upgrade, the new plan is applied immediately. You will instantly benefit from the new features. The billing date is updated to match the new subscription start date.
faqPricing.question_5: What happens if I downgrade my plan?
faqPricing.reponse_5: Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle. You will retain access to your current plan’s features until that date.
faqPricing.reponse_6: Payments are made monthly by credit card via Stripe, a secure payment provider. We do not store any sensitive payment information.
faqPricing.question_7: Can I try the service before subscribing?
faqPricing.reponse_7: Yes. A free plan is available, allowing you to test the service with a limited number of monthly credits. No credit card is required.
faqPricing.question_8: What happens if I run out of credits?
faqPricing.reponse_8: Once your credits are used up, you won’t be able to use the service until they are automatically reset the following month. You can also upgrade your plan at any time to get more credits.
faqPricing.reponse_9: Yes. Subscriptions automatically renew every month to ensure uninterrupted service. You can disable renewal from your account settings.
faqPricing.question_10: Can I use the service on multiple devices?
faqPricing.reponse_10: Yes. Your subscription is linked to your account, so you can access the service from any device as long as you are logged in.

terms.title: Terms of Service (ToS)
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as 'ToS') govern access to and use of the website and the progressive web application (PWA) for background removal (hereinafter referred to as 'the Service'), operated by the Provider. By accessing or using the Service, the user acknowledges having read, understood, and accepted these terms without reservation.
terms.article1_text: The Service allows users to upload images to automatically remove their background using an image-processing algorithm. The Service is accessible via a progressive web application (PWA) and may include additional features available through paid subscription plans.
terms.article2_text: Access to the Service is open to any person of legal age or with the legal authorization of their guardian. Some features may require the creation of a user account and/or the purchase of a paid subscription. The user agrees to provide accurate information during registration and to keep it up to date.
terms.article3_text:
The user is solely responsible for the content (images, text, metadata) they upload, transfer, or process via the Service. The user is strictly prohibited from uploading any content that:
- is pedopornographic, violent, hateful, defamatory, obscene, or otherwise offensive,
- infringes any image rights, copyrights, or intellectual property rights,
- violates the laws and regulations in force in Switzerland, the European Union, or the user’s country.

The Provider reserves the right to suspend or delete, without prior notice, any account or content suspected of violating these terms or applicable laws, and to report any illegal activity to the competent authorities. The Provider declines any liability for content processed by users.
terms.article4_title: 4. Use of the Service and Limitations
terms.article4_text: The user agrees to use the Service only for lawful and personal purposes. The Service may not be used for fraud, spamming, AI model training without written authorization, or any unauthorized commercial exploitation. The Provider may limit or suspend access to the Service for maintenance, security, or in cases of detected abuse.
terms.article5_text: Certain Service features are available through paid subscriptions. Prices, durations, and conditions are clearly displayed before any purchase. Payments are processed securely through a third-party provider. Refunds are only issued in case of an error attributable to the Provider or in accordance with applicable consumer protection laws.
terms.article6_text: The data collected (account information, billing data, uploaded images) are processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (FADP). Uploaded images are temporarily stored for processing and automatically deleted after a reasonable period. The user retains full ownership of their files.
terms.article7_text: The Service, its interface, algorithms, and trademarks are the exclusive property of the Provider. Any unauthorized reproduction, modification, or exploitation is strictly prohibited. The user retains intellectual property rights over the images they upload.
terms.article8_text: The Provider makes every effort to ensure the reliability and availability of the Service but does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The Provider shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the Service, including data loss, except in cases of proven gross negligence.
terms.article9_text: The Provider reserves the right to suspend or terminate a user account in case of violation of these ToS, suspected illegal activity, or abuse of the Service. In case of termination, no partial refund of a subscription will be granted.
terms.article10_text: These Terms are governed by Swiss law. In the event of a dispute, and unless otherwise required by mandatory legal provisions, the competent courts of the Canton of Vaud shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
terms.article11_text: The Provider reserves the right to modify these ToS at any time. Any modification becomes effective upon publication on the website. It is the user’s responsibility to regularly review the latest version of the Terms in force.
terms.conclusion: By using the Service, the user acknowledges having read and accepted these Terms of Service without reservation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Wizpix collects, uses, and protects personal data when providing its background removal service. Wizpix follows a data minimization and transparency approach (“privacy by design”).
privacy.article1_text:
Wizpix acts as the data controller under GDPR and applicable Swiss data protection laws.

Some third-party providers act as independent controllers or processors as described below.
privacy.article2_text:
Wizpix only collects data strictly necessary to provide the service:

- Email address (account creation)
- Password (securely hashed)
- Information voluntarily submitted via contact form
- IP address (for security purposes)

No payment data is collected or stored by Wizpix.

No images are stored on Wizpix servers.
privacy.article3_text: Payments are processed directly by Stripe, which acts as an independent data controller. Users enter payment details directly on Stripe’s secure interface. Wizpix has no access to this data and does not store it. More information: https://stripe.com/privacy
privacy.article4_text: Wizpix acts as a technical intermediary between users and AI models provided by Replicate, Inc. (USA). Images are transmitted via a secure API solely for processing and are immediately returned to the user. No user-identifying data (such as email or account information) is transmitted with the images. According to Replicate’s public documentation, API data is not used to train public models and is retained only as long as necessary for processing. Wizpix does not control Replicate’s processing activities, which operates as a processor or technical provider. More information: https://replicate.com/privacy
privacy.article5_text:
Data is used only to:

- Provide and operate the service
- Manage user accounts
- Respond to support requests
- Ensure service security and integrity

No data is used for advertising, tracking, or profiling.
privacy.article6_text:
Processing is based on:

- Service performance (contract)
- User consent
- Legitimate interest (security)
privacy.article7_text:
Wizpix uses a single cookie strictly necessary for the service to function. It is used to maintain user sessions.

No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.article8_text:
Data is retained only as long as necessary:

- Account data: until account deletion
- Contact data: limited to request handling
- Images: not stored by Wizpix
privacy.article9_text:
Personal data is never sold.

The only third-party interactions are:
- Stripe: payment processing (handled directly by them)
- Replicate: image processing only

No other personal data is shared.
privacy.article10_text:
Use of the service may involve data transfers outside the European Union, notably to the United States (Replicate).

These transfers are limited to strictly necessary data (images only) and occur through secure connections.
privacy.article11_text:
Wizpix implements appropriate technical and organizational measures, including:

- Encrypted communications (HTTPS)
- Secure password storage
- Restricted data access

However, no system can guarantee absolute security.
privacy.article12_text:
Under GDPR, you have the right to:

- Access your data
- Request correction or deletion
- Restrict or object to processing

You can exercise these rights via the contact form.
privacy.article13_text: Wizpix may update this policy at any time. The applicable version is the one published on the website.
privacy.conclusion: Wizpix is committed to minimizing data collection, ensuring transparency, and protecting user privacy.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: This legal notice aims to define the information related to the publisher, the hosting provider, and the general terms of use of the website for background removal (hereinafter referred to as 'the Service').
legal.article1_text: The website and the Service are published by: Company name: Helveclick Registered office address: Helveclick Dupanloup Guillaume, Chemin du Mont Paisible 1, 3963 Crans-Montana, Switzerland Company identification or SIRET number: Contact email address: info@helveclick.ch Publication manager: Dupanloup Guillaume The publisher is responsible for the content published on the website and for managing the Service.
legal.article2_text:
The website is hosted by:

Hosting provider: PlanetHoster
Address:
Website:
Contact email:

The hosting provider ensures the technical availability of the Service in accordance with its general terms and conditions.
legal.article3_text:
All content on the website and within the Service, including but not limited to text, images, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, videos, source code, and algorithms, is the exclusive property of the Provider, unless otherwise stated.

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, transmission, or adaptation of all or part of the website content, by any means or process, is prohibited without the prior written authorization of the Provider.

Any unauthorized use constitutes an infringement of intellectual property rights and may result in legal action under Swiss and European law.
legal.article4_text:
The Provider strives to ensure the accuracy and regular updating of the information published on the website. However, the Provider cannot be held liable for any errors, omissions, interruptions, or temporary unavailability of the Service.

The User acknowledges that they use the Service at their own risk. The Provider shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the Service, including data loss or file corruption.

The User is solely responsible for the content they upload via the Service. Any illegal content (including but not limited to content of a pedopornographic, violent, hateful nature, or contrary to Swiss and European law) is strictly prohibited and may be reported to the competent authorities.
legal.article5_text: The processing of personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy, which can be consulted at any time on the website. It details the nature of the data collected, the purposes of processing, retention periods, and the User’s rights in accordance with the GDPR and the Swiss Data Protection Act (FADP).
legal.article6_text: The website may contain hyperlinks to other websites. The Provider cannot be held responsible for the content, security, or privacy practices of such third-party sites. Access to these sites is at the sole responsibility of the User.
legal.article7_text: The Provider implements all necessary technical measures to secure access to and use of the Service. However, the User is informed that absolute security on the Internet does not exist. It is the User’s responsibility to protect their equipment and data (passwords, files, software).
legal.article8_text: This legal notice is governed by Swiss law. In the event of a dispute, and unless otherwise required by mandatory legal provisions, the competent courts of the Canton of Valais shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
legal.article9_text: For any questions regarding the website, its content, or its terms of use, you can contact the publisher via the website contact form or by email at info@helveclick.ch.
legal.conclusion: By accessing the website and using the Service, the User acknowledges having read and accepted this legal notice without reservation.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale (TCS)
cgv.intro: These Terms and Conditions of Sale (hereinafter “TCS”) govern the contractual relationship between the Provider and any user (hereinafter “the Client”) subscribing to a paid subscription offer on the website or progressive web application (PWA) for image background removal (hereinafter “the Service”). By subscribing to a plan, the Client unreservedly accepts these terms.
cgv.article1_text: The purpose of this agreement is to define the conditions under which the Provider makes available to the Client an online automatic image background removal Service, accessible through an annual subscription. The Service is provided in SaaS (Software as a Service) mode, hosted and maintained by the Provider.
cgv.article2_text:
Access to the paid features of the Service requires an annual subscription. The subscription is nominative, personal, and non-transferable.

The Client may subscribe, manage, or cancel their subscription from their personal account. Cancellation stops the automatic renewal but does not entitle the Client to a refund for the period already started.
cgv.article3_text:
The subscription is concluded for a period of one (1) year from the subscription date. At the end of this period, it is automatically renewed for an equivalent duration unless cancelled beforehand by the Client.

The Client may cancel their subscription at any time from their account. The cancellation takes effect at the subscription’s expiration date, with no refund for the remaining period.
cgv.article4_text:
The applicable prices are those in effect at the time of subscription, expressed in Swiss francs (CHF) or euros (EUR), all taxes included.

Payment is made online by credit card through the secure Stripe platform. The Provider does not store any sensitive banking information. Full payment for the subscription period is required at the time of subscription.
cgv.article5_title: 5. No Withdrawal Right and Refund Policy
cgv.article5_text:
In accordance with applicable legislation regarding digital service provision, the Client acknowledges that the Service begins immediately after the subscription is validated.

Consequently, no refund—full or partial—may be claimed in case of cancellation or early termination. However, the Client may cancel their subscription to prevent future renewal.
cgv.article6_title: 6. Suspension and Termination by the Provider
cgv.article6_text:
The Provider reserves the right to suspend or terminate a subscription in case of breach of these TCS, fraud, abusive behavior, or use of the Service contrary to law or ethics.

No compensation may be claimed by the Client in case of suspension or termination justified by a contractual breach.
cgv.article7_text:
The Provider makes every effort to ensure continuous availability of the Service. However, access may be temporarily suspended for maintenance, updates, or technical failures beyond the Provider’s control.

No compensation will be due for temporary interruptions of the Service.
cgv.article8_text:
The Provider is bound by a best-effort obligation. The Provider cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the Service, including data loss, non-compliant processed images, or temporary website malfunction.

The Client remains responsible for the files and content they upload to the platform.
cgv.article9_text: The Provider collects and processes certain personal data necessary for managing subscriptions and operating the Service. These processes are carried out in accordance with the website’s Privacy Policy and in compliance with GDPR and LPD (Switzerland).
cgv.article10_text:
The Service, its algorithms, interface, and content are the exclusive property of the Provider. Any reproduction, modification, or unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.

The Client retains intellectual property rights over the images they upload and process through the Service.
cgv.article11_text: Neither party shall be held liable for failure to perform due to an event of force majeure as defined under Swiss case law: natural disaster, major power outage, cyberattack, war, or government decision preventing contract execution.
cgv.article12_text: These TCS are governed by Swiss law. In case of dispute, and unless otherwise required by mandatory legal provisions, the competent courts of the canton of Valais shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
cgv.conclusion: By validating their subscription, the Client acknowledges having read, understood, and unreservedly accepted these Terms and Conditions of Sale.
